title: ChatBotAi
description: This Project Contains A Ai chatbot for helps in game
body:
How to Install
Install Fabric Loader for the Minecraft version required by the mod.
Download and install Fabric API. This mod is required for the AI Chat Bot mod to work.
Download the Minecraft Chat AI Mod .jar file from the Modrinth download page.
Move the downloaded .jar file into your Minecraft mods folder.
Example folder path:
Copy code

.minecraft/mods
Your folder should look similar to this:
Copy code

mods/
 ├─ fabric-api.jar
 └─ minecraft-chat-ai.jar
Start Minecraft using the Fabric Loader profile.
Launch a world or join a server and use the AI chat feature through the in-game chat.
Requirements
Minecraft (compatible version listed on the Modrinth page)
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
Notes
The mod requires an internet connection to generate AI responses.
A configuration file may be generated in the config folder after the first launch.
Make sure all dependencies are installed correctly before starting the game.
